The '''Dead Forest''' was a vast [[Forest/Legends|expanse]] of trees located on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. It was the home of the [[Raich's cave]]. The carnivorous [[Raich]] was attacked twice within the Dead Forest. The first time, the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] managed to place a [[magic cap]] on his head, turning him into a harmless tree.

The second time the Dead Forest was home to a battle was during the Raich's [[Raich crisis|temporary return]], when the Ewok [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] accidentally released the Raich. Wicket and his friends [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], and [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] were forced to find a way to re-trap the Raich, and they entered the Dead Forest to confront the Raich, eventually succeeding.

==Appearances==
